recommendations.temperature_high: Activate cold-room ventilation. Tomatoes degrade rapidly above 20 °C.
recommendations.humidity_low: Increase relative humidity with wet-burlap or misting. Target 85–95 % RH.
recommendations.gas_spike: Separate ethylene-producing items. Ventilate to reduce VOC concentration.

recommendations.temperature_high: Restore cold storage to 4–5 °C. Sprouting begins above 8 °C.
recommendations.humidity_low: Potatoes require near-saturation humidity (95–98 %). Check humidifier.
recommendations.gas_spike: Monitor for late-blight conditions (warm + humid). Ventilate immediately.

recommendations.temperature_high: Cool to 13–14 °C. Ripening accelerates exponentially above 18 °C.
recommendations.humidity_low: Maintain 90–95 % RH to prevent peel dehydration.
recommendations.gas_spike: High ethylene detected — bananas may be entering climacteric ripening. Sell soon.

recommendations.temperature_high: Temperature above 25 °C with high humidity promotes fungal growth.
recommendations.humidity_high: CRITICAL: Reduce RH below 65 % immediately. Grain moisture > 14 % causes mould.
recommendations.gas_spike: Elevated CO₂ suggests aerobic respiration or insect infestation. Fumigate.

recommendations.temperature_high: Sprouting begins above 5 °C. Reduce cold-store temperature.
recommendations.humidity_high: Onions require LOW humidity (65–70 %). High RH causes neck rot.
recommendations.gas_spike: Possible bacterial soft rot. Cull affected bulbs and improve airflow.
